ItacPersonItem.Notes: For Leonardo Nuzzi`s affiliation to the Agitati academy in Naples see Francesco Antonio Vitale, Memorie Istoriche degli Uomini Illustri di Ariano, Rome, 1788
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
